## 📚 Category / Area

- [ ] New learning category (e.g., new alphabet group, new color set)
- [ ] New audio files
- [ ] UI / Layout improvement
- [ ] New layout mode
- [ ] Slideshow feature
- [ ] New age-group theme (Primary / Junior / Toddler)
- [ ] Performance improvement
- [ ] Accessibility improvement

- [ ] Phase 2 — Primary (5–8 yrs) 🟡 Planned
- [ ] Phase 3 — Junior (8–12 yrs) 🟡 Planned
- [ ] Phase 4 — Toddler (1–3 yrs) 🔵 Future
